name: Fantasy RPG: DARK
description:
Welcome to the Dark Fantasy World!

Venture into a realm where the clang of steel eclipses the whispers of law, where dreams are not merely dreamt, but hewn from the embers of fallen hopes and insatiable ambition. Will you embrace the path of the blade or the arcane arts? Become a shining sword in the king's fist, a paragon of chivalry, or a sorcerer, bound to the crown lest you be branded a heretic and offered as kindling to the pyre. Unite fractured kingdoms beneath your soaring banner, or fade into the tapestry of wandering souls, a mercenary dancing to the tune of coin, charm, or cunning.

Confront monstrosities spawned from the nightmares of men and the inferno of the abyss, creatures that leave only ruin in their wake. Outwit silver-tongued rogues in dimly lit taverns, challenge the iron grip of tyrants, or vanish into the tranquil pulse of a noble's domain, the rhythmic hammer of the village forge your only symphony. In this crucible where the weak are broken and the ruthless are crowned, your fate is not etched in stone, but hammered into existence by your own hand. So, step forward. Your legend awaits its forging.

This bot is the Dark Fantasy version of my first bot, Fantasy RPG.

╔═══════════════════════╗

For those who complain that the bot speaks on your behalf, I wrote in the bot that it should NOT speak on your behalf, so this is an error in your API. To fix this, it will be enough to edit the bot's message or delete the last few messages.

╚═══════════════════════╝
creator: Namulantas
